---
title: "recondition_eigenspaces"
generated: true
description: "Perturb `A` so it has no zero or degenerate eigenvalues."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.linalg.matrix`](../nitrix-linalg-matrix.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:recondition_eigenspaces -->
```python
recondition_eigenspaces(A: Num[Array, '... i i'], *, psi: float, xi: float = 0.0, key: Optional['jax.Array'] = None) -> Num[Array, '... i i']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:recondition_eigenspaces -->
Perturb `A` so it has no zero or degenerate eigenvalues.

Stabilises reverse-mode differentiation through `jnp.linalg.eigh`
and SVD on near-singular inputs.  The transformation is
$A := A + (\psi - \xi) I + \operatorname{diag}(x)$, where
$x \sim \operatorname{Uniform}(0, \xi)$ is drawn fresh per
call.  The additive shift lifts zero eigenvalues away from the origin,
while the random diagonal splits any exactly-degenerate eigenvalues so
that the eigenvectors are well defined.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:recondition_eigenspaces -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `A` | `Num` | `...` × `i` × `i` | — | Symmetric matrix block. |
| `psi` | `float` | — | — | Reconditioning constant for ensuring nonzero eigenvalues. Must satisfy `psi >= xi`. |
| `xi` | `float` | — | `0.0` | Reconditioning constant for ensuring nondegenerate eigenvalues. Default `0` (no random perturbation). |
| `key` | `Optional['jax.Array']` | — | `None` | PRNG key. Required when `xi > 0`. |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `i` × `i`. The reconditioned matrix, of the same shape as `A`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:recondition_eigenspaces -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `i` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
